Onboarding re-do — phase 2 (design pass)

PLAN §9 #3, branch feat/onboarding-calibration-redo. Phase 1 (PR #112) instrumented the funnel; this phase changes what users see. Three changes:

  • Compass calibration is a first-class final step (design ref: design/screens/onboarding.jsx Variation A) — skippable, with the live ± readout as the feedback loop. The handle claim moved to its own step's CTA.
  • Camera-denied recovery — was a silent black screen with no way back.
  • Location-denied recovery — was a forever-"waiting" GPS.

Funnel effects to watch after ship: onboarding_completed.calibrated split, and whether compass_caution_shown falls for cohorts that calibrated in-flow.
